prompt: Assess change readiness for a department of 50 people moving to a new ERP system.
assertions: applies ADKAR assessment across the department
identifies readiness gaps per ADKAR dimension

prompt: Map resistance for a process automation project that will eliminate 10 manual roles.
assertions: identifies specific resistance sources and reasons
distinguishes rational concerns from emotional resistance
designs mitigation strategy per resistance type

prompt: Design change communication campaign for a 6-month digital transformation.
assertions: creates phased communication plan aligned with project milestones
defines key messages for each phase

prompt: Track adoption 3 months after new system go-live showing only 40% active usage.
assertions: investigates root causes for low adoption
designs feedback mechanism to understand user barriers
